scenario.context: Station 04 of the day flow: Classify the training company structurally and legally.
scenario.mission: You describe structure, goals and legal form of the company based on concrete work situations.

station.profile: Company structure, roles, corporate goals, legal forms
constraints: justify decisions in a traceable way

customerRequest.subject: Station 04: Company structure and corporate goals
customerRequest.body: Please classify the organizational structure, corporate goals and legal form in a practical way and justify their impact on training daily work.

questions.title: Recognize organizational structure
questions.prompt: Which statement best describes a clear organizational structure?

options.text: Roles and responsibilities are clearly defined per area
options.rationale: That is the core objective of organizational structure.
Not reliable for operations and training.

feedback.correct: Correct: clear responsibilities make an organization effective.
feedback.wrong: Not appropriate: organizational structure needs clear roles.

questions.title: Corporate goals in practice
questions.prompt: Which points can be legitimate corporate goals? (Multiple selection)

options.rationale: Quality is a central goal for many organizations.

options.text: Operate in a financially sustainable way

feedback.correct: Correct: the selection combines quality, business and development.
feedback.wrong: Partially wrong: please evaluate corporate goal systems more consistently.

questions.title: Explain the company profile
questions.prompt: Order the sequence for a short company description.
items: Name core service and target group
Make the link to your own role
correctOrder: Name core service and target group
Make the link to your own role

feedback.correct: Correct: the description is structured and practical.
feedback.wrong: Not optimal: please lead from profile through structure to role.

questions.title: Estimate department capacity
questions.prompt: A team has 6 people. Each person can handle 7 support cases per day. How many cases are plausible as daily capacity?

feedback.wrong: Please multiply team size and output per person.

questions.title: Explain company structure briefly
questions.prompt: Describe in 4-6 sentences how structure and goals of the company affect an apprentice's daily work.
questions.expectedOutline: Connection between structure, goals and concrete training daily work.

feedback.correct: Correct: the company context is clear and traceable.
feedback.wrong: Please link structure, goals and daily work more concretely.
